title: OpenAI TTS Plugin Configuration
description: JSON Schema for openai-tts-go plugin config.yaml. Mirrors Go struct (ttsConfigFile/ttsRewriterFile) validation constraints.

api_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (required, trailing slash stripped)

api_key.description: API key for the TTS provider

voice.description: Default TTS voice (e.g. alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)

output_dir.description: Output directory for generated audio files (relative to plugin dir or absolute)

max_text_chars.description: Maximum accepted text length for one tool call

upload_memory_threshold.description: Before-send upload threshold with unit (B, KB, MB, GB). Example: '1MB', '512KB'. In-memory if <= threshold, temp file if >

upload_memory_threshold_bytes.description: Alternative to upload_memory_threshold: exact byte count

headers.description: Optional extra HTTP headers (must not override Authorization)

enabled.description: Enable AI-based text/instructions rewriting (explicit true or false required)

api_base_url.description: Rewrite model API base URL (required when enabled=true)

api_key.description: Rewrite model API key (required when enabled=true)

timeout_seconds.description: Rewrite API timeout in seconds (required when enabled=true)

max_tokens.description: Max output tokens for rewrite completion (required when enabled=true)

prompt.description: Rewrite system prompt template (required when enabled=true)

generate_tts_audio_ms.description: Tool execution timeout in milliseconds for generate_tts_audio
